ts_step_1.description: Verify the LMS login service is reachable through the LMS API.

login_service_check.notes: The LMS login endpoint responded successfully.

ts_step_2.description: Verify the student or instructor account exists in the LMS.

user_lookup.notes: The LMS API returned a valid user account.

ts_step_3.description: Verify the LMS account status is active.

account_status_check.notes: The account exists but is currently inactive in the LMS.

ts_step_4.description: Verify authentication attempt using LMS credentials.

auth_attempt.notes: Authentication fails because the LMS account is inactive.

ts_step_5.description: Check LMS API rate limits to ensure login attempts are not being throttled.

rate_limit_check.notes: The LMS API rate limit is not preventing login attempts.
